mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tables ORDER BY campus_id, table_number

SELECT * FROM tables
AND campus_id = #{request.params.campusId}
AND table_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.params.tableNumber}, '%')
ORDER BY campus_id, table_number
SELECT * FROM tables WHERE campus_id = #{campusId} ORDER BY table_number
SELECT * FROM tables WHERE campus_id = #{campusId} AND table_number = #{tableNumber}

SELECT t.* FROM tables t WHERE t.campus_id = #{campusId} AND t.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT a.table_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.table_id IS NOT NULL AND a.status IN (0, 1) -- 待确认或已预约 AND ((a.start_time >= #{startTime} AND a.start_time < #{endTime}) OR (a.end_time > #{startTime} AND a.end_time <= #{endTime}) OR (a.start_time < #{startTime} AND a.end_time > #{endTime})) ) ORDER BY t.table_number
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tables WHERE campus_id = #{campusId}

SELECT t.id, t.campus_id, t.table_number, c.name AS campus_name, CASE WHEN ca.id IS NOT NULL AND ca.status IN (0, 1) AND NOW() BETWEEN ca.start_time AND ca.end_time THEN 'busy' ELSE 'available' END AS status, ca.id AS appointment_id, COALESCE(student.real_name, student.username) AS student_name, COALESCE(coach.real_name, coach.username) AS coach_name, DATE_FORMAT(ca.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(ca.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS end_time, CONCAT('¥', ca.cost) AS cost FROM tables t LEFT JOIN campus c ON t.campus_id = c.id LEFT JOIN appointments ca ON t.id = ca.table_id AND ca.status IN (0, 1) AND NOW() BETWEEN ca.start_time AND ca.end_time LEFT JOIN users student ON ca.student_id = student.id LEFT JOIN users coach ON ca.coach_id = coach.id
AND t.campus_id = #{request.params.campusId}
AND t.table_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.params.tableNumber}, '%')
ORDER BY t.campus_id, t.table_number
